title: Inspectors, Testers, Sorters, Samplers, and Weighers
description: Inspect, test, sort, sample, or weigh nonagricultural raw materials or processed, machined, fabricated, or assembled parts or products for defects, wear, and deviations from specifications. May use precision measuring instruments and complex test equipment.

tasks.text: Discard or reject products, materials, or equipment not meeting specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark items with details, such as grade or acceptance-rejection status.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure dimensions of products to verify conformance to specifications, using measuring instruments, such as rulers, calipers, gauges, or micrometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify supervisors or other personnel of production problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect, test, or measure materials, products, installations, or work for conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write test or inspection reports describing results, recommendations, or needed repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend necessary corrective actions, based on inspection results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read dials or meters to verify that equipment is functioning at specified levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make minor adjustments to equipment, such as turning setscrews to calibrate instruments to required tolerances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read blueprints, data, manuals, or other materials to determine specifications, inspection and testing procedures, adjustment methods, certification processes, formulas, or measuring instruments required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor production operations or equipment to ensure conformance to specifications, making necessary process or assembly adjustments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record inspection or test data, such as weights, temperatures, grades, or moisture content, and quantities inspected or graded.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Position products, components, or parts for testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove defects, such as chips, burrs, or lap corroded or pitted surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect or select samples for testing or for use as models.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stack or arrange tested products for further processing, shipping, or packaging.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Check arriving materials to ensure that they match purchase orders, submitting discrepancy reports as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect or test raw materials, parts, or products to determine compliance with environmental standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze test data, making computations as necessary, to determine test results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compare colors, shapes, textures, or grades of products or materials with color charts, templates, or samples to verify conformance to standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, maintain, calibrate, or repair measuring instruments or test equipment, such as dial indicators, fixed gauges, or height gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate, install, position, or connect components, parts, finished products, or instruments for testing or operational purposes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer tests to assess whether engineers or operators are qualified to use equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor machines that automatically measure, sort, or inspect products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Interpret legal requirements, provide safety information, or recommend compliance procedures to contractors, craft workers, engineers, or property owners.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust, clean, or repair products or processing equipment to correct defects found during inspections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compute usable amounts of items in shipments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grade, classify, or sort products according to sizes, weights, colors, or other specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble defective parts or components, such as inaccurate or worn gauges or measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute defect percentages or averages, using formulas and calculators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh materials, products, containers, or samples to verify packaging weights or ingredient quantities.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
